news.t: CYBER HORNET ETFs Broadens Suite of S&P 500® and Crypto Blended ETFs With the Launch of Three New Funds, Expanding Access to Digital Assets for Investors and Advisors

overview.description: The CYBER HORNET S&P 500 and XRP 75/25 Strategy ETF (XXX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target risk asset allocation. The fund tracks an index that provides 75/25 exposure to US large-cap stocks and XRP, respectively. The fund may hold XRP directly or via futures contracts and ETPs, capped at 10%. XXX was launched on Jan 29, 2026 and is issued by Cyber Hornet.
infoTable: 75% S&P 500 - 25% S&P XRP Reference Price Index

data.title: CYBER HORNET ETFs Broadens Suite of S&P 500® and Crypto Blended ETFs With the Launch of Three New Funds, Expanding Access to Digital Assets for Investors and Advisors
data.text: New funds pair the volatility profile of the S&P 500 ® with targeted exposure to leading digital assets through the liquid, transparent ETF structure
